We manufacture high-performance, durable movement gear designed to support your progression, protect your joints, and elevate your practice. All of our signature products are proudly crafted with premium materials right here in Canada.

The Canadian Made Difference

We don’t cut corners. By manufacturing locally, we ensure that every seam is reinforced, every piece of wood is perfectly finished, and every product can handle the daily abuse of outdoor park jams, studio training, and travel.
